title: Implement Contract Verification
description: Implement contract testing to validate API responses against a JSON schema.
instructions:
Given this JSON schema for a User API response:

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["id", "name", "email"],
  "properties": {
    "id": {"type": "integer"},
    "name": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "email": {"type": "string", "format": "email"},
    "avatar": {"type": ["string", "null"]}
  }
}
```

Write a contract test that:
1. Makes an API request to GET /api/users/1
2. Validates the response against the schema
3. Tests that the response includes all required fields
4. Tests that optional fields are handled correctly

hints.text: Use the json_schema package to validate responses against your schema.
Create a helper function that takes a response and schema, then returns validation errors.
Test both successful validation and failure cases where the response doesn't match.
